title: ixeris chinensis subsp. chinensis
intro: Ixeris chinensis subsp. chinensis, also known as the Chinese dandelion or Asian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ixeris chinensis subsp. chinensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce fever. It can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
